close_reason: Populated drill_deeper from 2xx response schema_refs and request body schema refs. title: Task 6: PHYLLOTAXIS_SPEC environment variable
description: Add PHYLLOTAXIS_SPEC env var support to resolve_spec_path. Precedence: --spec flag > env var > config file. Write 5 tests. Plan: docs/plans/2026-02-22-ux-improvements.md#task-6
close_reason: Added PHYLLOTAXIS_SPEC env var to resolve_spec_path. Precedence: --spec flag > env var > config. Empty string falls through, non-empty missing file is hard error. 5 new tests: uses_env_var, flag_wins, env_wins_over_config, not_found_is_error, empty_falls_through. All 148 tests pass.

title: Task 5: Search text renderer - emit full drill-down commands
description: Add drill-down command line under each endpoint match in search results. resource_slug already populated. Render-only change. Write 3 tests. Plan: docs/plans/2026-02-22-ux-improvements.md#task-5
close_reason: Added per-endpoint drill-down command in search results. Shows regardless of TTY (actionable data, not just hints). Coexists with existing TTY-only drill deeper block at bottom. 3 new tests: includes_drill_command, no_slug_omits, shown_off_tty. All tests pass.

title: Task 3: Text renderer - emit drill-deeper for endpoint detail
